page_metadata.biotools__summary: This package provides tools to assess if clusters have a separation different from random or permuted data. It investigates clusters of two or more groups by first, projecting all points onto a one dimensional line. Cluster separations are then scored and the probability of the seen separation being due to chance is evaluated using a permutation method.
